title: कुबेर गायत्री
devanagariText:
॥ श्री कुबेर गायत्री ॥

ॐ यक्षराजाय विद्महे
धनदाय धीमहि।
तन्नो कुबेरः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ द्वितीय कुबेर गायत्री ॥

ॐ वैश्रवणाय विद्महे
नवनिधीश्वराय धीमहि।
तन्नो धनेशः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ इति श्री कुबेर गायत्री सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Kubera Gayatri ||

Om Yaksha-rajaya Vidmahe
Dhana-daya Dhimahi.
Tanno Kuberah Prachodayat.

|| Dvitiya Kubera Gayatri ||

Om Vaishravanaya Vidmahe
Nava-nidhishvaraya Dhimahi.
Tanno Dhaneshah Prachodayat.

|| Iti Shri Kubera Gayatri Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: हम यक्षराज को जानते हैं, धनदाता का ध्यान करते हैं, वह कुबेर हमें प्रेरित करें। हम वैश्रवण को जानते हैं, नवनिधीश्वर का ध्यान करते हैं, वह धनेश हमें प्रेरित करें।
benefits: Gayatri mantra of Lord Kubera, the divine treasurer
Attracts wealth, riches, and financial abundance
Invokes the lord of the nine treasures (nava-nidhi)
Ideal for business owners and those seeking financial growth
Chant on Dhanteras and Fridays for maximum benefit
description: Kubera Gayatri — कुबेर गायत्री — is a powerful Vedic meditation mantra offered to Lord Kubera. Drawn from Kubera Tantra, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to gayatri mantra of Lord Kubera, the divine treasurer as well as chant on Dhanteras and Fridays for maximum benefit. Additionally, it is known to invoke the lord of the nine treasures (nava-nidhi). Recitation is particularly auspicious on Friday (Shukravar) and Thursday (Guruvar) and during Dhanteras and Diwali. The text contains 2 verses and takes around 2 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Kubera Gayatri in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Chant Kubera Gayatri Mantra in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Wealth-attracting Gayatri mantra for financial abundance and the nine treasures.
